sourcePrompt: An SA-2 Guideline surface-to-air missile on its launcher, the missile alone over ten meters long. A slender two-stage missile - cruciform fins at the tail of a flared booster, smaller fins mid-body and at the pointed nose - angled steeply skyward on a single launch rail atop a rotating pedestal with a trailer-style base. White missile. Low-poly, blocky, modular; simple readable silhouette.
